_note: Real per-season data, 1994-2025. The 1994-1997 seasons come from the digitized official Pitt media guides (University of Pittsburgh Library System, Documenting Pitt) - each guide carries the prior season's complete individual offense AND defensive statistics, transcribed from the full-resolution page scans; per-row sources cite the exact guide and pages. 1990s positions come from the guides' own alphabetical rosters plus per-player verification with citations. Sources by span: pittsburghpanthers.com official Sidearm stats (2013-2025); the Wayback-archived official CollegeSports-era cumulative pages (1999, 2001-2004 full offense+defense; the 2005-06 capture is MID-SEASON and deliberately unused; the 2000 page was never archived - a one-year defense hole covered by adjacent years); Sports-Reference (offense 1998+, full defense 2005-2012, and gap-heals for seasons the official payloads omit or mislink, each verified against SR). Coarse roster codes (DL/DB) were resolved player-by-player with citations; SR offense-table position guesses are never trusted for defenders. QB rushYds is the NCAA net. redshirtYears is coverage bookkeeping, not verified biography. honors[] is per-season, award-first (official Pitt media-guide honorees list + Wikipedia per-year All-America/ACC-season articles + conference award pages), with the attach step skipping honors whose season has no stat row (2000-hole honorees noted in the ledger).

ACC Defensive Rookie of the Year (2015)

ACC Defensive Player of the Year (2022)
